narrative:
Genoa Twp township has 19,714 registered voters, with 49.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.5 percentage points.
